phrases.intent_en: Where do I buy the Brno CARD?
phrases.cultural_note: Czech information centres often have dedicated counters; pointing with a gesture is common.

likely_response.translation_en: At the counter on the right.

responses.english: At the counter on the right.

phrases.intent_en: Where can I reserve theater tickets?
phrases.text_local: Kde si můžu rezervovat lístky do divadla?
phrases.cultural_note: The reservations clerk handles ticket bookings; a simple directional cue is sufficient.

likely_response.translation_en: At the reservations counter on the left.

responses.english: At the reservations counter on the left.
